name: Carrot Cake#1
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, cinnamon, and baking soda.
2. Add the cooking oil and grated carrots to the dry ingredients. Mix well.
3. Beat in the eggs one at a time until the batter is smooth.
4. Stir in the chopped nuts.
5. Pour the batter into two 9x5x2-inch loaf pans that have been greased and floured.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cakes comes out clean.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pans for 10 minutes before turning them out onto wire racks to cool completely.
8. For the frosting: In a separate bowl, beat together the cream cheese, margarine, and vanilla until smooth.
9. Gradually add the powdered sugar and mix until well combined.
10. Spread the frosting over the cooled cakes, if desired.
Frosting:
1. Beat the cream cheese and margarine together in a large bowl until smooth.
2. Gradually add the powdered sugar and beat until well incorporated.
